title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lite Bite Foods - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lite Bite Foods - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lite Bite Foods are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lite Bite Foods:
Lite Bite Foods is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods!
